role: Secretary-general of Freedom Movement of Iran (2017–present)
bio: Third secretary-general of the [Freedom Movement of Iran](/orgs/freedom-movement-of-iran) since 2017, succeeding [Ebrahim Yazdi](/people/ebrahim-yazdi). Imprisoned once under the Pahlavi regime (1 year) and five times under the Islamic Republic (4.3 years total).
editorial_notes: Current FMI secretary-general. Birth year uncertain (~1945).
